title: hemionitis marlothii
intro: Hemionitis marlothii, also known as the forest spleenwort, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to reduce pain and swelling. The health benefits of Hemionitis marlothii include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Hemionitis marlothii can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, where the leaves are steeped in hot water to release its medicinal properties.
